# yba_gcs_storage_config (Resource)

GCS (Google Cloud Storage) Configuration for YugabyteDB Anywhere backups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_location` (String) GCS bucket URI (e.g., gs://bucket-name/path).
- `name` (String) Name of the GCS storage configuration.

### Optional

- `credentials` (String, Sensitive) GCP Service Account credentials JSON. Required if use_gcp_iam is false.
- `region_locations` (Block List) Region-specific backup locations for multi-region backups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--region_locations))
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `use_gcp_iam` (Boolean) Use GCP IAM for authentication (workload identity). Supported for Kubernetes GKE clusters with workload identity. If true, credentials field is not required. Default: false.

### Read-Only

- `config_uuid` (String) UUID of the storage configuration.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--region_locations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region_locations`

Required:

- `location` (String) GCS bucket URI for this region.
- `region` (String) GCP region name (e.g., us-central1).


<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
